hero.title: One Person, Infinite Scale.
hero.subtitle: SiSquare AI is the future of software development. A Hong Kong-based One Person Company (OPC) powered by advanced AI Agents. We deliver enterprise-grade solutions with startup speed and zero overhead.

features.title: Why Choose an AI-Native OPC?
features.subtitle: Traditional companies can't compete with our speed and efficiency.

operation7x24.description: Our AI workforce never sleeps. Continuous development and support.

efficiency.title: Extreme Efficiency
efficiency.description: No bureaucracy, no overhead. Direct value from vision to code.

tech.title: Cutting-Edge Tech
tech.description: Built on the latest LLMs and Autonomous Agents (OpenClaw, etc.).

solutions.title: Cross-Border Software Solutions
solutions.subtitle: We build what matters. Fast, efficient, and scalable.

aiAgents.title: Custom AI Agent Development
aiAgents.description: Auto-Coding, Data Analysis, Research Automation, and more. Tailored AI agents that work 24/7 for your business.

mvp.description: From idea to working product in 48 hours. Perfect for validating concepts and pitching to investors.

about.title: About the Founder
about.name: Liang Cheng
about.bio1: Visionary founder dedicated to redefining the organizational structure of the AI era. Proving that a single human, augmented by digital intelligence, can outperform traditional corporations.
about.bio2: With a background spanning software engineering, management consulting, and AI innovation, Liang combines deep technical expertise with strategic thinking to deliver exceptional results for clients worldwide.

contact.subtitle: Ready to transform your ideas into reality? Let's talk.
